title: Pat Oliphant, prizewinning giant of political cartooning, dies at 90
description: The Pulitzer Prize-winning cartoonist skewered presidents from Johnson to Trump, reaching a vast audience through syndication.

title: Darline Graham Nordone has little political history beyond praising her brother
description: Darline Graham Nordone, the late Sen. Lindsey Graham’s younger sister, received the backing of President Donald Trump and Sen. Tim Scott to serve out the remainder of her brother’s term.

title: Lindsey Graham’s sister picked to serve the rest of his Senate term
description: South Carolina Gov. Henry McMaster (R) announced his selection of Darline Graham Nordone to serve into January. She is expected to be sworn in Tuesday.

title: Graham Platner's voters figure out what's next as candidates vie for their support
description: Maine voters are still grappling with Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner's dramatic departure from the race.

title: South Carolina's governor names Lindsey Graham's sister to serve out his term
description: South Carolina's governor says he is appointing Darline Graham to finish the term of her late brother. Top Republicans, including President Trump, have coalesced around the pick.

title: On foreign policy, Graham's influence may have been felt the most
description: Over the course of his three decades in Congress, Lindsey Graham was a major influence on Capitol Hill and throughout the world as one of the most vocal advocates for U.S. military might.

title: How Lindsey Graham tried to stay 'relevant'
description: NPR's Scott Detrow speaks with Mark Leibovich, staff writer for The Atlantic, about the trajectory of late Sen. Lindsey Graham as he tried to maintain relevance within his Republican Party.

title: Sen. Richard Blumenthal talks about Lindsey Graham's legacy
description: NPR's A Martinez speaks with Sen. Richard Blumenthal, D-Conn., about Sen. Lindsey Graham's legacy.

title: He was having a mental health crisis. Memphis task force agents came and shot him
description: Jonah Neal, 25, was struck by a Homeland Security Investigations agent in May. There have been at least four deadly shootings related to the task force.

title: Maine Democrats scramble to select replacement for Platner in Senate race
description: Maine Democrats now have a process for choosing a replacement for Senate candidate Graham Platner. But voters are still reeling from his fall.

title: Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows on her bid to replace Platner in Senate race
description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with Maine Secretary of State Shenna Bellows about her run to replace Graham Platner in the Maine Senate race.

title: Former member of federal Election Assistance Commission speaks out after dismissal
description: NPR's Michel Martin speaks with Benjamin Hovland, one of three members of the Election Assistance Commission fired last week by President Trump.

title: Congress returns to Washington this week
description: Congress returns from recess this week to face the sudden loss of a senator, a lengthy to-do list and limited time.

title: Lindsey Graham died of aortic dissection, preliminary medical report says
description: Graham died hours after returning from a trip to Ukraine. Trump said he spoke with the senator Saturday evening and that “could’ve been his last call.”
